ingest.feed_failure_notes: Axios returned an XML entity parse error; non-blocking with 34 other feeds.

cluster.notes: Iran/Hormuz mega-cluster (124 items) was keyword-split into 10 sub-clusters covering Hormuz, Israel-Lebanon, jet fuel, CDC, FEMA, RFK, etc.

selection.rationale: Highest raw_score and 2 mandate outlets (FT/Bloomberg via GN). Today's reopening + 10% oil drop is a fresh turning point in a recurring story; dedupe_penalty=0.3.
Core-beat (Tech) with strong mandate signal; new beat on White House access policy.
Distinct from Hormuz cluster; major US-brokered ceasefire announcement.
Core-beat Business; surprise corporate-governance shift with stock impact.
Core-beat Business; distinct second-order consequence of the Iran war (jet fuel) with IATA on-record warning.

fetch_failures: Google News redirect URLs (Reuters GN, AP News GN) returned 0 chars; used as headline-signal only.
Wired Anthropic-London piece 404'd; The Hill jet-fuel URL was PX-blocked. Both dropped without dropping below the 2-source floor.

notes: Slot 1 (Hormuz) revised to remove a misattributed CENTCOM 36-hour clause and a fabricated April 22 ceasefire expiry; re-editor approved.
Slot 5 (jet fuel) revised; editor reverted writer's 'Even with the strait reopening announced Friday' to 'Even if the strait reopens in the near future' and held with needs_review:true.

commit.message: edition: 2026-04-17 — Iran Declares Strait of Hormuz Fully Open — 5/5 stories
